response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong FAANG background and over 15 years of experience. He perfectly matches the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and possesses the required AI agent development and cloud infrastructure experience, making him an exceptionally strong candidate for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at top-tier tech companies.
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) workflows.
Deep expertise in software testing, including building open-source test runners and teaching TDD.
concerns: May be overqualified for a Mid-Senior role given his recent Staff Software Engineer title at Google.
Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though his deep Node.js and testing background mitigates this.
Resume contains some unusual entries (e.g., 'Founder, Amazon' and future dates) that require clarification.
